# Notation

This section includes a list of the notation used in this book.

$r$ - Measurement (e.g., distance/range, time, angle)
$\mathbf{x}$ - Position of the target
$\mathbf{x}_i$ - Position of the $i$-th reference node
$d_i$ - Distance measurement from the $i$-th reference node to the target
$\tau_i$ - Time of Arrival of the signal from the target to the $i$-th reference node
$w_i$ - Measurement noise for the $i$-th measurement
$c$ - Speed of light
